jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Care Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
Care Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Care Hospitals:
Care Hospitals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals!
